# Zicy

> Zicy is the AI visibility platform that shows you what AI says about your brand — whether it's true, and how to fix what's wrong — then proves the fix moved demand. It measures how every major answer engine describes a brand, diagnoses what's wrong (including hallucinations, outdated claims and entity gaps), gives you the tools to fix it (schema, llms.txt and content), and connects the work to demand via GA4 and Search Console. Coverage spans ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews and Google AI Mode, in every language. Built by Growth.pro; APAC-native, under Malaysia Digital (MD) status in Penang.

Zicy follows a closed loop — measure, diagnose, act, prove. The platform is self-serve from $129/mo; Growth.pro, the consultancy that built Zicy, also offers a done-for-you managed service built on its proprietary AI Visibility Operating System, PAVA Framework and AI Citation Enablement practice. Content tooling is built to current AEO/GEO best practice and aligned with Google's latest spam policies.

## Core
- [Home](https://www.zicy.com/): Be the brand AI gets right — the AI visibility platform that measures, diagnoses, fixes and proves across every major answer engine.
- [Platform](https://www.zicy.com/platform): Twelve modules across one closed loop (measure, diagnose, act, prove) — Prompt Manager, AI Visibility, Competitive AI Performance, Brand Intelligence, Brand Sentiment, Competitor Sentiment Profiles, Key Topics Analysis, Citation Analysis, Site Audit, Visibility Gaps, Action Center and Site Traffic. Every engine, every language.
- [Pricing](https://www.zicy.com/pricing): Self-serve plans — Starter $129/mo, Growth $349/mo, custom Enterprise. 7-day free trial; annual plan gives 13 months for the price of 12.
- [About](https://www.zicy.com/about): Built by Growth.pro; APAC-native, globally capable, under Malaysia Digital (MD) status.
- [Case studies](https://www.zicy.com/case-studies): Measured AI visibility results across ChatGPT, Gemini and Perplexity (clients anonymised pending naming permission).

## Solutions
- [For brands](https://www.zicy.com/solutions/brands): Other tools tell you AI mentioned you; Zicy tells you whether AI got you right.
- [For PR & communications](https://www.zicy.com/solutions/pr): Clippings count coverage; Zicy proves it moved the answer.
- [For marketing & creative agencies](https://www.zicy.com/solutions/agencies): White-label AI visibility — audited, fixed and proven. Sell the fix, not just the problem.
- [For publishers](https://www.zicy.com/solutions/publishers): See whether AI attributes your content, paraphrases it, or strips the credit.

## Free tools
- [Free tools hub](https://www.zicy.com/free-tools): Three free ways to see how AI reads your brand.
- [Free AI visibility audit](https://www.zicy.com/audit): Complimentary baseline of how AI describes your brand across every engine, benchmarked against rivals.
- [AEO/GEO Consultant](https://www.zicy.com/aeo-geo-consultant): A free AI consultant — audit a page or ask any AEO/GEO question. Powered by Growth.pro's proprietary framework.
- [Chrome extension](https://www.zicy.com/chrome-extension): On-page AI-readiness audit (0–100 score), AI bot-access checker (40+ crawlers), and one-click schema generator. Available in 12 languages.

## Case studies
- [eCommerce — 531 more AI citations in 4 months](https://www.zicy.com/case-studies/531-ai-citations-ecommerce): 531 additional AI citations, 53.6% ChatGPT share of voice.
- [eCommerce — AI traffic that converts](https://www.zicy.com/case-studies/increased-ai-users-and-events): 785 ChatGPT users driving 1,816 events (+406%).
- [eCommerce — content-led AI visibility](https://www.zicy.com/case-studies/ai-optimised-content): 290% more clicks, 457% more impressions.
- [Multi-category — from zero to 99 AI citations](https://www.zicy.com/case-studies/increasing-ai-citations): 0 → 99 AI citations, 12,800% more traffic.
- [eCommerce — AI-cited product pages](https://www.zicy.com/case-studies/aeo-case-study-brand-mentions-ai-cited-product-pages): 1,186% faster growth, 74.6% brand mention coverage.
- [eCommerce — mentions where competitors led on search](https://www.zicy.com/case-studies/aeo-case-study-brand-mentions-website-citation-coverage-in-ai-results): 82.9% brand mentions, 37.14% citation coverage.
- [Education — knowledge-led authority in AI answers](https://www.zicy.com/case-studies/aeo-case-study-brand-mentions-ai-citations-share-of-voice): 62.96% mentions, 36.51% citations, 23.04% share of voice.
- [eCommerce — AI visibility rebuilt for growth](https://www.zicy.com/case-studies/aeo-geo-case-study-ai-visibility-ecommerce-growth): 1,119% AI traffic growth, 68.97% brand mentions.
- [Healthcare / aesthetics — local category leadership](https://www.zicy.com/case-studies/aeo-case-study-aesthetic-clinic-ai-visibility): 52% mentions, 29.75% citations, share of voice 5.4% → 9.4%.
- [B2B — authority from a near-zero baseline](https://www.zicy.com/case-studies/aeo-geo-case-study-b2b): 90.61% mentions, 55.92% citations, 18.11% share of voice.
- [B2B — consistent presence across five engines](https://www.zicy.com/case-studies/aeo-geo-case-study-elevated-b2b-visibility): 54.17% mentions, 36.11% citations across 5 AI platforms.
- [Education — cited across every major engine](https://www.zicy.com/case-studies/aeo-geo-case-study-education-brand): 56.32% mentions, 51.05% citations across 5 AI platforms.
- [B2B services — invisible to AI-cited in 90 days](https://www.zicy.com/case-studies/aeo-case-study-b2b-brand-mentions-ai-sessions-growth): 56.67% mention rate, 2,971 AI-referred sessions.
- [Interior décor — cross-platform citation growth](https://www.zicy.com/case-studies/aeo-geo-case-study-interior-decor): 66% mentions, 47% citations, 19% share of voice.
- [B2B electronics — sessions and coverage together](https://www.zicy.com/case-studies/aeo-geo-case-study-b2b-electronics): 157% AI sessions growth, 40.57% brand mentions, 34.44% citations.

## Managed service
- [Done-for-you (by Growth.pro)](https://www.growth.pro/): Growth.pro operates the entire AI visibility programme for you, using Zicy as its delivery engine. Selective roster, no lock-in, category exclusivity.

## Resources
- [Guides & research](https://www.zicy.com/resources): Practical AEO/GEO guides, original research, and updates on how AI search is changing brand discovery.
